---
title: "Social Security Taxation Reform"
subtitle: "Draft manuscript for long-run policy analysis and impact assessment"
author:
  - "Max Ghenis"
  - "Ben Ogorek"
  - "Pavel Makarchuk"
  - "David Trimmer"
date: 2026-04-15
lang: en
abstract: |
  This draft manuscript is the narrative companion to the interactive Social
  Security taxation-of-benefits dashboard. It documents the full reform menu,
  the long-run microsimulation and calibration strategy, the validation and
  benchmark framework, and the publication architecture for the current CRFB
  analysis package. The dashboard remains the live current-results explorer;
  this paper is the stable long-form surface intended for citation, SSRN-style
  circulation, and formal external reference once shared exhibits are frozen.
keywords:
  - Social Security
  - Taxation of benefits
  - Trust funds
  - Microsimulation
  - PolicyEngine
  - CRFB
---

{{< include sections/01-scope.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/02-policy-design.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/03-methods.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/04-results-and-validation.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/05-results-framework.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/06-publication-boundary.qmd >}}

# References

::: {#refs}
:::
